topics.title: Comedy Roast Post-Mortem
topics.summary: The studio reviews the recent comedy roast, discussing specific performances by comedians like Lisa Lampanelli and Dave Attell while addressing listener feedback regarding the show's format.

topics.title: Howard TV Awards and Guest Commentary
topics.summary: The show reviews listener feedback regarding recent guests, discusses the internal results of a staff awards ceremony, and recounts an incident involving John Stamos.

topics.title: Intern Dynamics and Workplace Friction
topics.summary: The studio explores the interpersonal dynamics between staff members, specifically addressing an intern's interactions with colleagues and the internal tensions regarding workplace behavior.

topics.title: American Idol Contestants and Show Dynamics
topics.summary: The studio discusses the physical appearance and appeal of American Idol contestants, the influence of looks on pop music success, and personal anecdotes regarding a listener's hospital stay.

topics.title: King of Cable Prank Calls
topics.summary: The studio celebrates a former prank caller known as King of Cable, who gained notoriety at age 15 for making numerous disruptive calls to various radio and television programs.

topics.title: King of Cable Retrospective
topics.summary: The show features a tribute to the "King of Cable" persona, discussing its history of prank calls and the impact it had on the program's culture.

topics.title: King of Cable and Mango Industry Call
topics.summary: The show features a segment honoring the "King of Cable," followed by an interview with a man in the mango industry who discusses his financial situation and local area.

topics.title: Radio Show Segments and Guest Interactions
topics.summary: The studio features a variety of segments including discussions on listener rewards, a roast recap involving Bob Levy, news regarding Department of Homeland Security personnel listening to the show, and an interview with a musician about health and personal life.

topics.title: Intern Awards and Staff Recognition
topics.summary: The studio reviews various humorous awards given to staff members and interns, including categories for the creepiest staffer, best dressed, and most likely to succeed.

topics.title: Henry Hill Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts a phone interview with former mobster Henry Hill to discuss his past, the events of the film Goodfellas, and his current life.

topics.title: Henry Hill and Mob Retrospective
topics.summary: The studio features an intense discussion with Henry Hill regarding his past in the mob, the accuracy of the film Goodfellas, and personal anecdotes about his life after prison.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip Game and Show Updates
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where guests evaluate various celebrity rumors before transitioning into a discussion about upcoming show segments and listener interaction.

topics.title: Jerry Falwell Death and Media Reaction
topics.summary: The studio discusses the controversial legacy of Reverend Jerry Falwell following his death, focusing on his past remarks regarding 9/11, secularism, and LGBTQ+ issues.

topics.title: Jerry Falwell's Legacy and Cultural News
topics.summary: The studio features a heated debate over the legacy of Jerry Falwell, followed by segments on Milwaukee Brewers fans, New York Yankees pitching struggles, demographic shifts in the United States, and a drug-related incident at a McDonald's.

topics.title: Medical Research on Herpes and Viral Immunity
topics.summary: The show discusses a new study in Nature magazine regarding how certain dormant forms of herpes may help the body resist bacterial infections.
